description: Metadata for tools/*.ps1; templates/scripts governed by bootstrap-manifest projectBootstrap.scripts

writes: Project .claude/ and managed paths under -ProjectPath (see script)

generatedWriteTargets: Managed templates copied into target project .claude/ tree
